name: Acme Supplier Agent
description: Autonomous fulfillment for industrial parts via AlloyDB ScaNN. Supports text queries and direct image-based multimodal search.

skills.name: Search Inventory
skills.description: Searches the warehouse database using AlloyDB ScaNN. Accepts text queries, pre-computed embeddings, or base64 images for multimodal search.
examples: Find stock for Industrial Widget X-9
